search.query: ProductCode:batchcompute and source: instance_bill  | select case when rnk =1 then ClusterId else '' end as "集群Id", billingitem as "计费项", concat(cast(Usage as varchar),'(',UsageUnit,')')  as "用量", fee as "费用",concat(cast(round(Percent,3) as varchar),'%') as "同比上月", case when rnk = 1 then cast(round(totalFee,3) as varchar) else '' end as "集群费用" from(select ClusterId,fee, billingitem, rank() over(partition by ClusterId order by fee desc) as rnk ,sum(fee) over(partition by ClusterId)  as totalFee, Usage, Percent,UsageUnit  from(select ClusterId, billingitem, d1[1] as Usage, d2[1] as fee, round(d2[3]*100-100,3) as percent, UsageUnit from( select ClusterId, BillingItem,compare(usage,2592000) as d1, compare(fee,2592000) as d2, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from(  select  BillingItem, split_part(InstanceID, ';',1) as ClusterId, sum(Usage) as Usage ,round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as fee, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from log  WHERE split_part(split_part(InstanceID, ';',1), '-',1) = 'cls' group by ClusterId,BillingItem) group by ClusterId, BillingItem)))  where Usage is not null order by totalFee desc, rnk limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:batchcompute | select BillingItem as "计费项", round(sum(PretaxGrossAmount),3) as "费用" group by "计费项" order by "费用" desc

search.query: source:bill  and PretaxAmount> 0 and ProductCode:batchcompute | select round(di[1],3) as "当天费用",di[2] as "前日费用",round(di[3]*100-100,3) as percent from(select compare(fee, 86400) as di  from(select  sum(PretaxAmount) as fee from log))

search.query: source:bill and ProductCode:batchcompute | select t as  "时间", "金额" from(select *,min(t) over() as mt from( select  date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m') as t,  round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as "金额"  from log group by t order by t)) where t > mt

search.query: ProductCode:batchcompute and source: instance_bill | select date as "日期", COUNT(DISTINCT id) as "实例数" from ( SELECT date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as date, split_part(InstanceID, ';',2) as id from log GROUP BY date, id)  GROUP BY date order by "日期"
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量" | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期" , avg(Usage)*1024*1024*1024  as "存储空间" group by "日期" order by "日期"

search.query: ProductCode:batchcompute and source: instance_bill |select case when SubscriptionType ='PayAsYouGo' then  '按量' else '竞价' end  as "付费类型", round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)   as "金额" group by "付费类型" order by  "金额" desc limit 1000
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量" | select date_format(__time__,'%Y-%m-%d') as "日期" , concat(cast(round(avg(Usage),3) as varchar),'G')   as "存储空间" group by "日期" order by "日期"

search.query: ProductCode:batchcompute and source: instance_bill | select round(sum(fee)/ count(distinct(id)),3) as "平均实例消费" from (SELECT split_part(InstanceID, ';',2) as id, PretaxAmount as fee, BillingItem from log GROUP BY id, BillingItem,fee) LIMIT 1000
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss   and BillingItem: "标准存储(本地冗余)容量" | select max_by(Usage,__time__)*1024*1024*1024   as "存储空间"

search.query: ProductCode:batchcompute and source: instance_bill  | select case when rnk =1 then ClusterId else '' end as "作业Id", billingitem as "计费项", concat(cast(Usage as varchar),'(',UsageUnit,')')  as "用量", fee as "费用", case when rnk = 1 then cast(round(totalFee,3) as varchar) else '' end as "作业费用" from(select ClusterId,fee, billingitem, rank() over(partition by ClusterId order by fee desc) as rnk ,sum(fee) over(partition by ClusterId)  as totalFee, Usage, UsageUnit  from(  select  BillingItem, split_part(split_part(InstanceID, ';',1), '_', 1) as ClusterId, sum(Usage) as Usage ,round(sum(PretaxAmount),3)  as fee, arbitrary(UsageUnit) as UsageUnit from log  WHERE split_part(split_part(InstanceID, ';',1), '-',1) = 'job' group by ClusterId,BillingItem))  where Usage is not null order by totalFee desc, rnk limit 100
search.tokenQuery: source: instance_bill and ProductCode:oss | select BillingItem as "计费项", round(sum(PretaxGrossAmount),3) as "费用" group by "计费项" order by "费用" desc
